figures.caption: TABLE I. Overview of previous works based on DFT calculation for transition-metal trihalide monolayers.

TABLE II. Calculated in-plane lattice constant, energy difference between AFM and FM states (∆E = EAFM − EFM), transition-metal spin moment (SM ) and band gap energy with SOC (Egap) and Chern number for MX3 monolayer with GGA+U functional. For reference, the nominal d-orbital occupations for high-spin M3+ ions are: V: t2 2ge0 g, Cr: t3 2ge0 g, Mn: t3 2ge1 g, Fe: t3 2ge2 g, Ni: t6 2ge1 g, and Pd: t6 2ge1 g.

FIG. 4. (a) The bandstructure of monolayer PdF3 with sz polarization in color, red for up spin and blue for down spin. Fermi energy is set to zero. (b) The calculated anomalous Hall conductivity of monolayer PdF3 as a function of energy near the Fermi level.
